title.en: At this moment, Ye Tian became completely famous.

content.en:
As soon as Ye Tian appeared, he immediately used the Yin and Yang Pole Knife to slash this Dao Ancestor incarnation in an instant, and then used a door method to continuously greet this Dao Ancestor incarnation.

After a round of attacks, the incarnation of this Dao Ancestor finally couldn't hold on, could no longer heal, and completely disintegrated, revealing countless treasures in the space in his body.

At this point, all the three Dao Ancestor incarnations have fallen, and Ye Tian has harvested many treasures that the three Dao Ancestor incarnations have harvested over the years, which can be regarded as a big profit.

In fact, he didn't want to fight with the Dao Ancestor incarnations, but these Dao Ancestor incarnations had to surround him.

And Ye Tian and the Three Great Dao Ancestors incarnated a bit big, and some True Monarch Divine Senses spied on here before, so they knew about this battle.

At this time, the battle ended, and the situation about the battle was naturally publicized.

Soon, many True Monarchs on the battlefield ruins knew about Ye Tian's fight with the three Dao Ancestor incarnations, and knew that Ye Tian had killed the three Dao Ancestor incarnations.

At this moment, Ye Tian became completely famous.

What is the concept of Dao Ancestor incarnation, it is easy to kill a half-step True Ancestor, even if it is a very powerful half-step True Ancestor, it is not an opponent of Dao Ancestor incarnation at all.

At the very least, the Dao Ancestor incarnations have been here for so long, and no half-step True Ancestor has been able to beat the Dao Ancestor Incarnation, and all the True Monarchs or half-step True Ancestors who provoked the Dao Ancestor Incarnation have all fallen, and only a very few can escape with the help of special treasures or secret techniques.

And the person who really killed the incarnation of Dao Ancestor was only Ye Tian.

Before, Ye Tian killed the Tumen Dao Ancestor, but because Ye Tian killed him under the blockade of the Void Lock, no one saw the battle process, so many people did not approve of Ye Tian beheading the Tumen Dao Ancestor.

As for the back, Ye Tian snatched the Heaven Splitting Divine Pillar from the hands of many Dao Ancestor incarnations, and it was also believed that Ye Tian grabbed it by chance, which was due to luck.

But this time was different, Ye Tian was Zhengda Guangming and the incarnation of the Three Great Dao Ancestors, and killed them one by one, and some of the True Monarchs nearby even recorded this battle, which shocked everyone.

Battlefield Ruins, the interior of an ancient well in the underground ruins.

Yunzi Priestess is practicing with the help of the water of the ancient well here, this ancient well is not an ordinary ancient well, but a natural treasure, the water of the ancient well here is completely the treasure of heaven and earth, and it is an excellent treasure for refining the body.

At this time, her aura was many times stronger than when she first entered the battlefield ruins, which showed how much benefit she had gained during this time.

If someone came here, they would find that the Yunzi Divine Maiden exuded the light of the Extreme Dao.

If the True Monarch tempers his body to the extreme, he will slowly form the body of the Extreme Dao, and the body of the Extreme Dao represents that the physical body has evolved to the extreme at the level of the True Monarch, and it cannot advance an inch, this is the real body of the Extreme Dao.

And the Yunzi Divine Maiden exuded the light of the Extreme Dao, which proved that she had touched the threshold of the Extreme Dao Body, and she was not far from completely forming the Extreme Dao Body.

When she becomes the body of the Extreme Dao, her physical body will be refined to the current limit, and as long as she condenses a complete Dao, she can break through to the half-step True Ancestor realm.

Of course, if you don't form an Extreme Dao body, as long as you have a complete Dao, you can also break through to the half-step True Ancestor realm, but in this way, your own potential can't be fully exploited, and few True Monarchs will be so stupid!

The Cloud Purple Divine Maiden was far from reaching the realm of the Extreme Dao Body before, but now that she was about to form the Extreme Dao Body, it could be seen that her progress was really too great.

However, even if the Cloud Purple Divine Maiden formed an Extreme Dao body, her physical strength was far inferior to Ye Tian.

Once the foundation is set, it's hard to change.

Ye Tian's foundation is too strong, no one can compare with him, even the Dao Ancestor lineage like Yun Zi Divine Maiden cannot be compared to Ye Tian, the difference between the two sides is too big to be incredible.

Suddenly.

The Cloud Purple Divine Maiden opened her eyes, and she accepted the news from the other True Monarchs of the God of War Tower.

"Hmm, Wanfa Daozi killed three Dao Ancestor incarnations!

The Yun Zi Divine Maiden couldn't believe it.

She knew very well the power of the Dao Ancestor incarnation, no matter how much she looked up to Ye Tian, she couldn't imagine that she could be comparable to the Dao Ancestor incarnation.

Before, she was confident that Ye Tian would be comparable to those powerful half-step true ancestors, but those half-step true ancestors were also like ants in the eyes of the Dao Ancestor incarnation, and the two sides were not on the same level at all.

But now, Ye Tian has killed three Dao Ancestor incarnations, and it is Zhengda Guangming who killed the three Dao Ancestor incarnations, which is terrifying!

Immediately, she laughed at herself: "Originally, I thought that I was making rapid progress, but I didn't expect that Wanfa Daozi would make even greater progress!"

Of course, she will not be so arrogant that she has to compare with Ye Tian.

But Ye Tian's strength also really stimulated her, making her understand that she was still very weak, and she was really lucky to find such a treasure this time, so she naturally had to cultivate hard and improve her strength.

There were quite a few True Monarchs who thought like Yun Zi Divine Maiden, such as those True Monarchs in the Void Heaven Palace, and they were really stunned by Ye Tian's amazing achievements.

And Yang Long Zhenjun, who was Ye Tian's servant, was also stunned by his master's strength, and hurriedly sent a message to congratulate his master.

In the blink of an eye, dozens of days have passed.

Ye Tian finally found the Lanyue Dao Ancestor, he never gave up chasing and killing the Lanyue Dao Ancestor, Mengyue Dao Ancestor and Fengbo Dao Ancestor, but the traces of these Dao Ancestors were not easy to find, and it was not until now that he was discovered by a true monarch of the Void Heaven Temple and informed him.

"Ye Tian, there is no hatred between us at all, I reminded you to be careful of Tumen Dao Ancestor!"

Lanyue Dao Ancestor yelled.

He was afraid, he didn't care about Ye Tian before, but now Ye Tian had killed a total of four Dao Ancestor incarnations, and his strength was much, much stronger than him, he didn't want this incarnation to fall on the battlefield ruins, so he coaxed.

"Lanyue Dao Ancestor, what did you think that day, don't think I don't know, and you are chasing and killing me with other Dao Ancestor incarnations later, if I didn't have the means, I'm afraid I would have fallen a long time ago. I am different from your Dao Ancestor, your current body is just an incarnation, and it will not affect you if you die, but I am the main body, once I fall, then I will really fall! With my current strength, even my master will not be able to resurrect me. So, there is a lot of hatred between you and me!"

Ye Tian said.

Lanyue Dao Ancestor knew that he couldn't move Ye Tian, so he went all out to escape and leave, and he didn't dare to fight Ye Tian at all.

However, he could not escape.

In an instant, he was caught up by Ye Tian.

After a while, the incarnation of Lanyue Dao Ancestor was killed here by Ye Tian.

In the chaos outside the Quasi-Dao Realm, a Dao Ancestor roared angrily, and this Dao Ancestor was none other than the Lanyue Dao Ancestor.
